canonical_definition: Benchmark for aggregative question answering comprising 6,027 multiple-choice questions derived from 182,330 real-world chatbot conversations, assessing models' ability to extract collective insights across temporal, geographic, and demographic dimensions.

definitions.text: Benchmark for aggregative question answering comprising 6,027 multiple-choice questions derived from 182,330 real-world chatbot conversations, assessing models' ability to extract collective insights across temporal, geographic, and demographic dimensions.

relationships.evidence: To facilitate research into Aggregative Question Answering, we introduce WildChat-AQA, a benchmark constructed from the WildChat dataset (Zhao et al., 2024b; Deng et al., 2024). (Section 1)

characterization: Benchmark for aggregative question answering comprising 6,027 multiple-choice questions derived from 182,330 real-world chatbot conversations, assessing models' ability to extract collective insights across temporal, geographic, and demographic dimensions.
